LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER 733 FRONT STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S PETITION TO APPROVE THE AMENDMENT TO SECTION 4.7 OF THE AMENDED AND RESTATED DECLARATION OF COVENANTS, CONDITIONS AND RESTRICTIONS ESTABLISHING A PLAN FOR CONDOMINIUM OWNERSHIP OF 733 FRONT STREET PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA CIVIL CODE SECTION 1356 IS GRANTED. PETITIONER PROVIDED PROOFS OF SERVICE AND COPIES OF THE EX PARTE APPLICATION FILED ON 9/8/11 AND THE COURT'S 11/17/11 ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER, COURT REPORTER: TEANNA WARD, CSR #11918

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Amendment To Section 4.7 Of The Amended And Restated Dec. Of Covenants, Conditions And Restriction Establishing A Plan For Condominium Ownership
Off Calendar Dec-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ann Rankin, Esq., Law Offices, 510-653-8886 for petitioner and moving party
No other appearance.

Discussed. PETITIONER 733 FRONT STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION'S Notice Of Hearing On The Petition To Approve The Amendment To Section 4.7 Of The Amended And Restated Declaration Of Covenants, Conditions And Restrictions Establishing A Plan For Condominium Ownership of 733 Front Street Pursuant to California Civil Code Section 1356 is granted.
Petitioner provided proofs of service and copies of the ex parte application filed on 9/8/11 and the Court's 11/17/11 Order.
Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla Miller, Court Reporter: Teanna Ward, CSR #11918
